hero.label: Made for Vimcal
hero.headline: I want to help Vimcal become the default calendar for busy teams.
hero.subheadline: I am excited by Vimcal because it solves a painfully common problem with a product people instantly feel: speed. The chance to join as the first SDR and help build outbound for Vimcal Maestro and Vimcal EA with the founding team is exactly the kind of early sales role I want.

whyCompany.title: Vimcal wins on speed for people with too many meetings
whyCompany.body: Vimcal stands out because it is not just another calendar app. It is built for founders, executives, remote teams, and executive assistants who feel the cost of slow scheduling every day.

whyCompany.title: First SDR hire means real ownership and growth
whyCompany.body: Joining as Vimcal's first SDR is exciting because this is not a plug and play sales job. It is a chance to work closely with John Li and the founding team, shape outbound from the ground up, and directly influence pipeline at an important growth stage.

whyCompany.title: I have already built pipeline through outbound prospecting
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I ran cold outreach through HubSpot and LinkedIn sequences and helped acquire 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I strengthened my marketing foundation in a B2B consultancy environment, which helps me think more clearly about messaging, targeting, and buyer pain points.

quote: I want this role because Vimcal has the kind of product that makes outbound feel honest. When a tool is genuinely faster and better for busy professionals, my job becomes finding the right people and starting the right conversations.
